chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2714 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For hearing of bail application ------------------------------------------ 13.02.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Shah, advocate for applicants Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh IO/DSP Ghulam Ali Khan Marwat, Investigation Keamari Mr. Reehan Qadeer, advocate for complainant ------------------------------------ Applicants/accused Muhammad Naseem Khan, Muhammad Aziz Khan and Muhammad Khan are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicants/accused submits that the IO has recommended this case for disposal in “A” Class and applicants/accused are no more required in the investigation. IO is present in Court and admits this fact that they are not involved in the alleged offence, therefore, he has recommended the case for disposal in “A” Class. Counsel for complainant seeks time to argue his case. Since the IO has found the applicants/accused innocent, therefore, interim pre- arrest bail granted to the applicants/accused vide order dated 20.11.2024 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
